Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard.RestGuard

Packages that use RestGuard
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard
REST Guards

  • Uses of RestGuard in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth

    Subclasses of RestGuard in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ApiKeyGuard
    AuthN RestGuard that authenticates requests via a raw API-key string.
    class 
    BearerTokenGuard
    AuthN RestGuard that authenticates requests via the RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.

  • Uses of RestGuard in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard

    Subclasses of RestGuard in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DenyAllGuard
    Deny-all RestGuard — rejects every request with 403 Forbidden.
    class 
    RateLimitGuard
    Token-bucket RestGuard that throttles requests on a configurable per-request key.
    class 
    RoleBasedRestGuard
    RestGuard that uses role expressions to determine whether an authenticated user has access to a class or method.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard that return RestGuard
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestGuard[]
    RestGuardList.asArray()
    Returns the entries in this list.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestGuardList.Builder
    RestGuardList.Builder.append(RestGuard... values)
    Appends the specified rest guard objects to the list.
